item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal Tipped Worker Minimum Wage
item.description:
👀 Tipped Worker Minimum Wage

Federal tipped minimum wage modernization 119th Congress: phase-out of subminimum tipped wage · One Fair Wage proposals · cooperative-class restaurant model preference. Composes with #1 Lets Make Dinner (cooperative-class restaurant participation) + Worker Misclassification. 🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.
